Jasmine
Delana.

Brand strategist. Social media architect. AI educator.
The person you call when the brand needs to actually work.

Social Media Strategy Brand Development Content Direction AI Prompt Creation Digital Marketing Creative Direction

Who She Is

Strategy with soul.
Brand with purpose.

Jasmine Delana is a brand and project management executive, digital marketing strategist, creative storyteller, and entrepreneur operating out of Dallas, Texas. She doesn't just grow accounts — she builds ecosystems that make brands undeniable.

As Marketing Strategy Director at The Potter's House Dallas, she leads discovery-to-execution pipelines for a megachurch ministry reaching hundreds of thousands in person, online, nationally, and internationally — handling everything from social strategy to creative direction to multi-ministry campaign management.

Outside of The Potter's House Dallas, Jasmine is the founder of Blueprint Studio — her creative and strategy house encompassing multiple brands and ventures across marketing, AI education, apparel, and artist brand strategy.

Through her personal brand @iamjasminedelana, she's built a community of women in their 30s and 40s around the belief that your story isn't backstory — it's the whole point.

Education

B.S. Psychology
MBA, Marketing
Graduate Certificate, Project Management

What She Does

Six disciplines. One unified vision: make your brand impossible to ignore.

01

Social Media Strategy & Management

Full-funnel social strategy from channel audit to content calendar to community management. She's grown accounts for megachurches, recording artists, retail brands, and national organizations — and she understands both the algorithm and the audience.

02

Brand Development & Identity

Visual communications, messaging architecture, and brand voice development. She's shaped the public-facing identity for ministries, entrepreneurs, artists, and institutions — including building Blueprint Studio as a full creative brand from the ground up.

03

Content Direction & Creation

From editorial shoot concepts to caption writing to long-form storytelling, Jasmine directs content that converts — because she leads with the story before the strategy, and the strategy sticks.

04

Marketing Campaign Strategy

Multi-channel campaign architecture across social, email, SMS, paid media, and in-person activations. She builds briefs, manages discovery, and hands the team a roadmap they can actually execute.

05

Creative Project Management

MBA-trained in methodology, she runs projects end-to-end — from talent booking and contract negotiation to event production and ministry launch management. Strategy that stays on deadline.

06

AI Integration & Prompt Education

She teaches creators and brands how to leverage AI tools for content production, visual generation, and workflow efficiency. Specialties: hyperrealistic AI imagery, brand consistency systems, and sellable digital prompt libraries.

Investment

Strategy with soul, scoped to fit. Every partnership is custom — here's where the conversation begins.

01

Brand Strategy & Identity

Brand audit, positioning, messaging architecture, voice, and visual direction — the foundation that makes everything else work.

$3,500–$7,500 · project

02

Social Media Strategy & Management

Channel strategy, content calendar, content creation and curation, community management, and monthly reporting. Scales by platform count.

$2,000–$4,000 · monthly

03

Marketing Campaign Strategy

Multi-channel campaign architecture across social, email, SMS, and paid — briefs, discovery, and an execution-ready roadmap.

$4,000–$10,000 · project

04

Content Direction & Creation

Editorial and shoot concepts, creative direction, and conversion-focused copywriting that leads with story.

$1,500–$3,500 · project

05

Strategy Intensive & Consulting

For brands that need clarity and direction, not full-service management — focused sessions that move you forward.

$250 · hourly / VIP Day $1,500

06

Custom Packages & Retainers

Ongoing partnerships, artist brand strategy, and admin support — scoped to exactly what you need.

Monthly Retainers

Ongoing partnership for brands that want a true marketing partner — not a one-off.

TIER 01

The Essentials

$1,500 / month

For brands that need a consistent, polished presence.

  • →Management of 1–2 platforms
  • →Monthly content calendar
  • →Scheduling & publishing
  • →Community management
  • →Monthly performance report

TIER 02 · MOST POPULAR

The Growth Partner

$3,000 / month

For brands actively scaling their reach.

  • →Everything in Essentials, up to 4 platforms
  • →Content creation & direction
  • →One campaign per quarter
  • →Email or SMS support
  • →Bi-weekly strategy calls

TIER 03

The Full Brand Partnership

$5,000+ / month

For brands that want a fractional marketing leader.

  • →Full-funnel marketing strategy
  • →Multi-platform management
  • →Ongoing content direction
  • →Campaign architecture & brand oversight
  • →Priority access + monthly executive reporting

Custom retainer tiers available on request · Rates current as of 2026

Web Design & Development

Custom-built, story-first websites — designed to convert and made to last. (Like the one you're looking at.)

01

Landing / One-Page Site

A single, high-impact page — custom design, mobile-responsive, contact form, and basic SEO. Perfect for launches, offers, or an elevated link-in-bio.

$1,200–$2,500 · project

02

Brand & Portfolio Site

A full multi-page custom site (5–8 pages) — original design, responsive build, contact forms, blog/journal, complete SEO, and deployment. The tier this very site was built in.

$4,000–$8,000 · project

03

Premium / Custom Build

Larger, more complex builds — e-commerce, custom functionality, multiple subdomains, integrations, or phased ongoing work.

$8,000+ · project

04

Site Care Plan

Post-launch peace of mind — ongoing edits, content updates, monitoring, and small enhancements, billed monthly.

$150–$400 · monthly

Hosting and domain costs passed through at cost · Rates current as of 2026

The Work

She's already done the thing
you need done.

The Potter's House Dallas, Inc.

Grew and managed social media presence for one of the largest non-denominational megachurches in the U.S. — founded by Bishop T.D. Jakes, reaching hundreds of thousands in person, online, nationally, and internationally. Strategy, content direction, and platform management across all digital channels and multi-ministry campaigns.

↳ The Wheel

Grew The Wheel's social media platform from 9,000 to over 19,000 followers in just 1.5 years — a full content overhaul and community-building strategy that more than doubled the audience. The page has since been converted to The House Shop, which Jasmine continues to manage and grow.

↳ The House Shop

Currently manages The House Shop — the official retail brand of The Potter's House Dallas — overseeing social media strategy, content direction, and platform growth as the natural evolution of the groundwork she laid with The Wheel.

↳ International Leadership Summit

Worked on the International Leadership Summit (ILS) — T.D. Jakes' annual transformative conference for business and ministry leaders. Developed comprehensive digital content run-of-shows covering the full event marketing lifecycle: email, SMS, social media, and traditional and digital paid media. Past speakers include Denzel Washington, Tyler Perry, Joel Osteen, and Steve Harvey.

Artist Brand Strategist

Strategic representation for national recording artists at the highest levels of gospel and inspirational music — managing talent bookings, project pipelines, artist brand positioning, and label-level contract strategy.

↳ Tim Reddick

Managed social media strategy and brand presence for recording artist Tim Reddick, building platform-specific content strategy to grow reach and deepen audience engagement across his artist brand.

↳ Jabari Johnson

Jasmine serves as strategic representative and project manager for national recording artist, guitarist, songwriter, and producer Jabari Johnson. To understand the caliber of artist she's in the room with: Jabari is a Grammy Award-winning guitarist (Tori Kelly's Hiding Place), a Stellar Award winner for New Artist of the Year (34th Annual Stellar Awards), a Dove Award nominee, the writer behind "Try Jesus" performed by Tobe Nwigwe, and his single "Fixed Fight" hit #1 on the Billboard Gospel National Airplay Chart. That's who she represents — and that's the level she operates at.

Joint College of Bishops

Served as primary Brand Strategist and Marketing Director for the Joint College of African-American Pentecostal Bishops (JCOB) from 2011 to 2020 — a national Christian organization founded in 1993 to train Pentecostal and Charismatic bishops across the country. Built and maintained brand identity, social media presence, and marketing strategy at a national level.

JDEM Suite

Founded JDEM Suite, a full-service visual communications and digital marketing agency — offering brand strategy, creative direction, website development, graphic design, and virtual assistance. Served hundreds of brands with an innovative, story-first approach that gets noticed and gets results.

8:15 Collection

Founded 8:15 Collection — a faith-rooted apparel brand built on the belief that identity is worth wearing. Drops include The Identity Collection (Kept · Worthy · More Than Enough) and The Winter Reset capsule (Joy Runs Deep · Still Covered · Grace Carried Me) — minimal in aesthetic, meaningful in message. Premium everyday essentials designed for confidence, quiet strength, and wearable declaration.

@iamjasminedelana

Built and sustained a multi-platform personal brand community entirely through organic content — no paid ads, no shortcuts. Starting at approximately 10,000 followers in 2020, Jasmine locked into a disciplined posting cadence (minimum 3x per week: Monday, Wednesday, Friday), pioneered voiceover reels as her signature format, and grew her following nearly 5x over six years. What makes the growth story remarkable isn't just the numbers — it's that even during extended breaks from posting, her community remained active and engaged. She didn't just grow an audience. She built a loyal one.

Blueprint Studio

One house.
Five distinct brands.

Blueprint Studio is Jasmine's creative and entrepreneurial umbrella — housing every venture she's built outside of The Potter's House Dallas. Strategy, apparel, AI education, and artist representation. All under one roof. All built with intention.

01

JDEM Suite

Visual Communications & Digital Marketing Agency

Full-service boutique agency offering brand strategy, creative direction, website development, graphic design, and digital marketing. Served hundreds of brands across industries with a story-first approach that gets results.

02

BrandWellCo

AI Education & Digital Products

Jasmine's digital product brand teaching creators and entrepreneurs how to harness AI for content creation, brand building, and visual generation. Offerings include editorial AI prompt libraries, hyperrealistic shoot packs, the Brand Twin framework, and the free AI Prompt Book. Shop BrandWellCo →

03

8:15 Collection

Faith-Rooted Apparel Brand

A premium apparel brand built on the belief that identity is worth wearing. Drops are intentional, minimal in aesthetic, and rooted in faith. Current collections include The Identity Collection (Kept · Worthy · More Than Enough) and The Winter Reset capsule (Joy Runs Deep · Still Covered · Grace Carried Me). Wearable declarations for people who know who they are. Shop the Collection →

04

Artist Brand Strategist

Artist Brand Strategy & Coordination

Strategic representation for national recording artists — overseeing artist brand strategy, project pipelines, brand positioning, and label-level contract coordination. Specializing in gospel, faith-based, and inspirational artists at the highest levels of the industry.

05

The Modern Admin

Virtual Admin & Booking Coordination

Professional virtual admin and booking coordination support for gospel artists, speakers, influencers, and creatives. Services include booking & inquiry management, travel planning, calendar & communication management, contract creation & follow-up, host liaison, event coordination, admin support for brand deals and appearances, and custom systems to streamline day-to-day operations. Available via monthly retainer or project-based packages. Learn more →

AI-Generated · Blueprint Studio · @iamjasminedelana

New Offering · AI Literacy & Prompt Creation

She's teaching the future
of content creation.

Jasmine is an AI educator and prompt engineer — deep in research and actively pursuing credentials in this space — who teaches creators and brands how to harness AI tools not as a replacement for creativity, but as an amplifier of it. She has developed comprehensive prompt library systems for hyperrealistic and editorial AI image generation, built for creators who want consistency, quality, and a professional edge.

Free AI Prompt Book available now — a starter library for creators ready to level up
Developed 9+ editorial AI prompt series including surreal, hyperrealist, color-blocking, and power editorial styles
Created a proprietary "Brand Twin" framework for generating consistent AI imagery with locked likeness
Packages and sells AI prompt libraries as digital products via BrandWellCo on Stan Store
Teaching women to use AI as a tool for brand-building, content creation, and business growth
